children.heading: Presidential report
children.label: a Presidential report
children.text: Not later than 120 days after each inauguration of a President, the President shall submit a report to the Congress on his general and specific nonproliferation and threat reduction objectives and how the efforts of executive branch agencies will be coordinated most effectively, pursuant to , to achieve those objectives.section 2357b of this title

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: b Consultation
children.text: The President should consult with and brief, from time to time, the appropriate committees of Congress regarding the efficacy of the coordination mechanism established pursuant to in achieving its stated objectives.section 2357b of this title
